message:
feat(harness): extension parity matrix updates

Add new entries: fts5_source_id(), uuid_str(), uuid_blob() as Partial
scalar functions. Upgrade JSON -> and ->> operators from Missing to
Partial (rationale removed). All 5 new/upgraded surfaces added to
"connection-runtime-wired" tag group.

Test renamed and assertions inverted; new
runtime_wired_scalar_contract_entries_are_present test. Minor test
formatting fix for rustfmt compliance.
